## Summary / 变更摘要


## Testing / 测试

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run smoke`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Screenshots / 截图

If this changes UI behavior, add screenshots or a short screen recording.  
如果改动影响界面或交互，请附截图或简短录屏。

## Notes / 备注

Do not include private JSON data, credentials, tokens, or screenshots containing secrets.  
请勿包含私密 JSON、凭据、token 或包含敏感信息的截图。
